channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pet litter in forest, 14th April
item.description:
Someone has taken to dumping their cat or dog litter in the forest over the past few months. It is NOT the biodegradable kind! There are several dumps, including one just by the bus stop on Dunkery Road. Very visible. Full of feaces too. Please put up signs or post flyers to residents nearby.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Farm Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandon car, 14th April
item.description:
Back passenger window wide open.over a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lincoln Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are alot of litter at the location behind the barriers of the two opposing train platforms, 14th April
item.description:
This issue has been going on for one year with no improvements

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road North, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned temporary barriers, 14th April
item.description:
These barriers have been here for a month since recent surfacing work

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kent Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collapsed inspection cover, 14th April
item.description:
Inspection cover collapsed in bus lane towards Bugsby Way

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bugsbys Way, Charlton

item.title: Half bed frame ect, 14th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped half a bed frame and some other bits on Oakley Place SE1 5AD

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakley Place, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 14th April
item.description:
Please resurface the entrance to Woodington Close. There is a large pothole and the condition of the road here is unacceptable.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodington Close, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: More flytipping -14 April, 14th April
item.description:
Continuous fly tipping here - please do daily pick ups
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tryon Crescent, Hackney, London

item.title: Rubbish dumped in alleyway behind 16,17,18 and 19 Ritter Street, 14th April
item.description:
This has been left by someone and the caretakers who walk down there, have never done anything about it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ritter Street, Woolwich
